# Visual Studio Code Recommended Settings And Extensions

The recommended settings for this project has been added to the [.vscode/settings.json](settings.json) file.
These settings are automatically applied when you open this project in Visual Studio Code.

## Recommended Extensions

The following extensions are recommended for this project:

- [Python](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ms-python.python)
- [Pylance](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ms-python.vscode-pylance)
- [Ruff](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=charliermarsh.ruff)
- [Python Test Explorer for Visual Studio Code](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=LittleFoxTeam.vscode-python-test-adapter)
- [autoDocstring - Python Docstring Generator](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=njpwerner.autodocstring)
- [Code Spell Checker](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=streetsidesoftware.code-spell-checker)
